advancement.aeronautics.for_every_action: Place and power a Propeller to generate Thrust
advancement.aeronautics.ghostbuster.desc: Kill a Phantom using a Mounted Potato Cannon
advancement.aeronautics.head_in_the_clou: Fill an airtight Envelope structure with hot air
advancement.aeronautics.heavier_artiller: Fire a vegetable from a Mounted Potato Cannon
advancement.aeronautics.high_fashion.des: Obtain a pair of Aviator's Goggles
advancement.aeronautics.in_thrust_we_tru: Assemble a Propeller Bearing to generate more Thrust
advancement.aeronautics.now_available_in:
Crystallize Levitite Blend into Pearlescent Levitite
§7(Hidden Advancement)
Toss a music disc into the clouds to create something new
aeronautics.ponder.burner_pressure.heade: Effect of Air Pressure on Hot Air Burners
aeronautics.ponder.burner_pressure.text_: Hot Air Burners are affected by Air Pressure
Simulated Contraptions will settle when Lift and Weight are in balance
Changing Lift thus allows changing Altitude
The precise Air Pressure can be read from an Altitude Sensor
aeronautics.ponder.envelope.text_1: Envelope Blocks enclose a volume that generates Lift when filled with Hot Air
aeronautics.ponder.envelope.text_2: Hot Air sources fill Balloons from the top downwards
aeronautics.ponder.envelope.text_3: Hot Air must be contained by Airtight Blocks
aeronautics.ponder.envelope.text_4: Shafts can be encased with Envelope Blocks to make them airtight
aeronautics.ponder.envelope.text_5: Blocks inside the Balloon will reduce the available Volume
aeronautics.ponder.envelope.text_6: Right-Click with Dye to paint them
aeronautics.ponder.gyro_pressure.header: Effect of Air Pressure on Gyroscopic Propeller Bearings
aeronautics.ponder.gyro_pressure.text_1: Gyroscopic Propeller Bearings are affected by Air Pressure
aeronautics.ponder.gyro_pressure.text_3: Simulated Contraptions will settle when Thrust and Weight are in balance
aeronautics.ponder.gyro_pressure.text_4: Changing Thrust thus allows changing Altitude
aeronautics.ponder.gyro_pressure.text_5: The precise Air Pressure can be read from an Altitude Sensor
aeronautics.ponder.gyroscopic_propeller_: Stabilizing using upside down Gyroscopic Propeller Bearings
When Gyroscopic Propeller Bearings are facing downwards...
Controlling Gyroscopic Propeller Bearings with Redstone
Sometimes the upwards Tilt can be undesired
Applying a Redstone signal will reset the Tilt to zero
Stabilizing helicopters using Gyroscopic Propeller Bearings
Normal Propeller Bearings may be unsuitable for helicopters
Gyroscopic Propeller Bearings should be used in this situation
The Gyroscopic Propeller Bearing attempts to keep the propeller upright
aeronautics.ponder.hot_air_burner.header: Generating Lift using the Hot Air Burner
aeronautics.ponder.hot_air_burner.text_1: Hot Air Burners generate Lift by filling Balloons with Hot Air
aeronautics.ponder.hot_air_burner.text_2: When Powered with Redstone, the Hot Air Burner will gradually fill the Balloon above itself
aeronautics.ponder.hot_air_burner.text_3: The input panel can be used to select the maximum Hot Air output
aeronautics.ponder.hot_air_burner.text_4: Adjusting the Redstone Input will scale the selected output proportionally
aeronautics.ponder.hot_air_burner.text_5: The Lift Force is limited by the size of the Balloon
aeronautics.ponder.hot_air_burner.text_6: Multiple Hot Air Burners can combine their output into a single Balloon
aeronautics.ponder.hot_air_burner.text_7: For aesthetic purposes, the fire type can be changed with a Soul-Infused item
aeronautics.ponder.levitite.text_1: When enough Levitite is attached to a simulated contraption...
aeronautics.ponder.levitite.text_3: Simulated Contraptions cannot gain altitude using Levitite alone
aeronautics.ponder.levitite.text_5: At low movement speeds, Levitite significantly resists motion
aeronautics.ponder.levitite.text_6: This resistance drops at higher movement speeds
aeronautics.ponder.levitite_blend.text_1: Levitite Blend can be crystallized into Levitite
aeronautics.ponder.levitite_blend.text_3: Once catalyzed, the Levitite cannot be recollected
aeronautics.ponder.levitite_blend.text_4: Nearby heat sources can also start the crystallization process
aeronautics.ponder.levitite_blend.text_5: After the reaction is started, the crystal will spread throughout the entire fluid
aeronautics.ponder.levitite_blend.text_6: When certain blocks are used to cast Levitite...
aeronautics.ponder.levitite_blend.text_7: ...they will be destroyed during the crystallization process
aeronautics.ponder.miniprop_pressure.hea: Effect of Air Pressure on Propellers
aeronautics.ponder.miniprop_pressure.tex: Propellers are affected by Air Pressure
The precise Air Pressure can be read from an Altitude Sensor
aeronautics.ponder.mounted_potato_cannon: The Mounted Potato Cannon is a block version of the Potato Cannon
It accepts the same ammo as the Potato Cannon...
...and can be loaded by automated means
Use rotational force to charge up the Cannon
After the Cannon is fully charged, power it with redstone to fire
The Cannon can be continuously powered for automatic fire
aeronautics.ponder.propeller_bearing_siz: Propeller Bearings attach to the block in front of them
Propellers with more sails are more efficient at producing Thrust
Any structure can count as a valid Propeller, as long as it has at least 2 valid sail-like blocks
aeronautics.ponder.propeller_bearing_thr: Several types of propellers can produce Thrust
Reversing the rotation direction reverses the Thrust
The Thrust can also be reversed using a wrench
If the Propeller is moving through the air, it cannot push as hard, as the air is already moving
The Propeller's Thrust and Airflow can be inspected with Engineer's Goggles
aeronautics.ponder.propeller_pressure.he: Effect of Air Pressure on Propeller Bearings
aeronautics.ponder.propeller_pressure.te: Propeller Bearings are affected by Air Pressure
The precise Air Pressure can be read from an Altitude Sensor
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.header: Generating Lift using the Steam Vent
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.text_1: Steam Vents generate Lift by filling Balloons with Steam
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.text_2: When Powered with Redstone, the Steam Vent will gradually fill the Balloon above itself
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.text_3: Like Steam Engines, sufficient Heat, Water, and Boiler Space are required
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.text_4: The input panel can be used to select the maximum Steam output
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.text_5: Adjusting the Redstone Input will scale the selected output proportionally
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.text_6: The Lift Force is limited by the size of the Balloon
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.text_7: Multiple Steam Vents can combine their output into a single Balloon
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.text_8: Note an adequate power level is needed for multiple Steam Vents to run at full capacity
aeronautics.ponder.steam_vent.text_9: For aesthetic purposes, the metal can be changed with an Iron Sheet
aeronautics.ponder.tag.levitite_breakabl: Blocks that are broken when nearby Levitite Blend crystallizes into Levitite. Useful for making molds for casting
aeronautics.ponder.vent_pressure.header: Effect of Air Pressure on Steam Vents
aeronautics.ponder.vent_pressure.text_1: Steam Vents are affected by Air Pressure
aeronautics.ponder.vent_pressure.text_3: Simulated Contraptions will settle when Lift and Weight are in balance
aeronautics.ponder.vent_pressure.text_4: Changing Lift thus allows changing Altitude
aeronautics.ponder.vent_pressure.text_5: The precise Air Pressure can be read from an Altitude Sensor
block.aeronautics.smart_propeller.toolti: _Reverses_ the direction the Propeller provides thrust.
_Generates thrust_ when spun. _Pitches the propeller_ along one axis to _attempt to face upwards._
item.aeronautics.aviators_goggles.toolti: _Kinetic components_ show added _Stress Impact_ or _Capacity_. _Stressometers_ show statistics of their _attached kinetic network_. Some other blocks reveal information such as item and fluid content.
Augments your HUD with _miscellaneous information_ about placed components.
